temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) A silhouetted car is shown crashed on a dirt road at dusk. The sun is setting behind a distant tree, casting a faint light on the cloudy sky. The Chinese characters '风行网' (Fengxing.com) are superimposed in the upper left corner. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a mysterious and somber tone, immediately introducing a sense of danger and tragedy with the crashed car.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A high-pitched, ethereal choral sound begins, creating a sense of suspense and melancholy.)
(00:04-00:05) A silhouetted figure of a person with short hair appears, standing still and looking towards the crashed car. The figure's presence adds to the ominous atmosphere. (Storyline: The appearance of a mysterious figure introduces a human element to the scene, suggesting a survivor or a witness to the event.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The ethereal choral music continues, swelling slightly to emphasize the dramatic reveal of the figure.)
